mapper.insert: INSERT INTO catalog_import_runs ( id, provider_id, source, operation, status, started_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{providerId}, #{source}, #{operation}, #{status}, #{startedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE catalog_import_runs SET source = #{source}, status = #{status}, inserted_count = #{insertedCount}, updated_count = #{updatedCount}, skipped_count = #{skippedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, total_processed = #{totalProcessed}, error_kind = #{errorKind}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = #{durationMs} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_external_ids ( movie_id, provider_id, source, external_id_type, external_id ) VALUES ( #{movieId}, #{providerId}, #{source}, #{externalIdType}, #{externalId} )
INSERT INTO movie_genres ( movie_id, provider_id, source, genre ) VALUES ( #{movieId}, #{providerId}, #{source}, #{genre} )
INSERT INTO movie_people ( movie_id, provider_id, source, person_name, role, billing_order ) VALUES ( #{movieId}, #{providerId}, #{source}, #{personName}, #{role}, #{billingOrder} )
